competitor_gaps: No Etsy-specific 5x7 guide exists. Generic photo sites cover dimensions but not Etsy seller workflow, ZIP packaging, or ratio pack inclusion. No one explains that 5x7 is NOT the same ratio as 8x10.
conversion_angle: Reference page with dimension table feel -> CTA after explaining Extras pack includes 5x7
